## Validation

- [ ] npm run lint
- [ ] npm run test:ci
- [ ] npm run build
- [ ] npm run test:e2e:ci (for UI or workflow-impacting changes)

## Security and Operations

- [ ] No secrets/tokens added to code or logs
- [ ] API contract updated if route behavior changed
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
